creator: amontalban@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 200989
percona56-server.patch

Hi,

This patch is to update databases/percona56-server and -client to 5.6.42-84.2, this is to fix most of the vulnerabilities listed in https://vuxml.freebsd.org/freebsd/ec5072b0-d43a-11e8-a6d2-b499baebfeaf.html.

Thanks!
